name: C E Ferulic Serum
description: Gold-standard antioxidant serum combining 15% pure vitamin C (L-ascorbic acid), 1% vitamin E, and 0.5% ferulic acid. Protects against environmental damage and improves signs of aging.
howToUse: Apply 4-5 drops to clean, dry skin every morning before moisturizer and sunscreen. Allow to absorb for 1-2 minutes.
drCostiRecommendation: This is my go-to morning antioxidant for most patients. The combination of vitamins C, E, and ferulic acid provides unmatched environmental protection. Essential for anyone concerned about aging or sun damage.

name: Retinol 0.5 Refining Night Cream
description: Concentrated retinol cream that improves fine lines, wrinkles, and skin discoloration while minimizing irritation through a controlled delivery system.
howToUse: Apply a pea-sized amount to clean skin at night, 2-3 times per week initially, gradually increasing frequency. Always use sunscreen the next morning.
drCostiRecommendation: I start most anti-aging patients on this retinol. It's effective yet gentle enough for most skin types. The key is gradual introduction to build tolerance.

name: Ultra Facial UV Defense SPF 50
description: Lightweight, broad-spectrum UV protection with a matte finish. Suitable for all skin types and works well under makeup.
howToUse: Apply liberally to face and neck 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours or after swimming/sweating.
drCostiRecommendation: Sunscreen is the single most important product in any skincare routine. I tell every patient: no treatment will be effective without consistent sun protection. This formula works beautifully in our Middle Eastern climate.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Intensifier
description: Multi-functional serum that amplifies the skin's hyaluronic acid levels by 30%. Contains proxylane, licorice root, and purple rice extract for plumping and firmness.
howToUse: Apply 4-5 drops to face, neck, and chest morning and evening after serum, before moisturizer.
drCostiRecommendation: Excellent for patients who feel their skin is dehydrated or lacking plumpness. I especially recommend this after filler treatments to support the hyaluronic acid we've injected.

name: Gentle Cleanser
description: Mild, soap-free cleanser that removes impurities and makeup without stripping the skin's natural moisture barrier. Ideal for sensitive and post-procedure skin.
howToUse: Apply to damp skin, massage gently in circular motions, rinse with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening.
drCostiRecommendation: A gentle cleanser is the foundation of good skincare. I recommend this for all my patients, especially those undergoing procedures like peels or laser treatments.
